name: Spaghetti Squash Casserole (Moosewood) with Lentils
recipeInstructions:
- Cook and strand an 8-inch spaghetti squash.
- In a large skillet, sauté onions, garlic, salt, pepper, and mushrooms in butter until fragrant. Add herbs and chopped tomatoes. Cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
- Transfer the mixture to a buttered 2-quart casserole dish. Top with shredded mozzarella cheese, breadcrumbs tossed with Parmesan cheese, fresh parsley, basil, and thyme.
- Bake at 375°F for about 40 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown. Garnish with additional Parmesan cheese before serving.
